name: Image path regex prefix rule
summary: Regex for image paths requires path prefix to avoid matching random words with extensions.
detail: Updated extractImagesFromText to match /path/to/image.png, ./image.png, ~/image.png but not bare filenames to prevent false positives on random words in conversation text.
content: Updated extractImagesFromText to match /path/to/image.png, ./image.png, ~/image.png but not bare filenames to prevent false positives on random words in conversation text.
